environment: Windows desktop; stored production OAuth grant; selected Drive workspace; Google Drive and Sheets APIs
limitations: The run proves native Google Sheet literal-value writes and independent readback for one linked account and selected workspace.
It does not prove Google Docs or Slides mutation support; those APIs were enabled for future typed actions, but those file types remain read-only in release 0.1.7.
Formatting, formulas, named-tab selection, structural edits, and concurrent-write controls remain outside this probe.
